ham.subject: Scheduled OneDrive Maintenance – 23 March 2026
ham.body:
Dear Team,

Please be advised that OneDrive will undergo routine maintenance on Wednesday, 23 March 2026 from 10:00 PM to 1:00 AM IST. During this time, you may experience intermittent access to shared files and folders. This is a normal part of our service enhancement plan.

No action is required on your part. Should you encounter any issues, kindly contact the IT Help Desk at helpdesk@company.com.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
IT Service Management

spam.subject: URGENT: Your Microsoft Account Has Been Suspended
spam.body:
Hello,

We have detected multiple unauthorized login attempts on your Microsoft account. As a security measure, we have temporarily suspended access to protect your personal data.

If you wish to restore immediate access, you must verify your identity within the next 24 hours. Failure to do so will result in permanent account disabling.

Click the secure link below to confirm your identity and reactivate your account:
<URL>

If you did not authorize these changes, please contact Microsoft Support immediately.

Thank you,
Microsoft Security Team
